skill.name: analyze
skill.description: Understand the current state, flows, and issues before making changes.

skill.name: implement
skill.description: Deliver a scoped change that meets the stated requirements with minimal surface area.

skill.name: optimize
skill.description: Improve performance or resource usage with evidence and clear trade-offs.

skill.name: plan
skill.description: Create a concise plan with risks and checkpoints before executing any changes.

skill.name: refactor
skill.description: Improve structure and clarity without changing externally visible behavior.

skill.name: review
skill.description: Inspect changes for correctness, risks, and regressions before accepting them.

skill.name: spec-clarify
skill.description: Ask targeted questions to clarify scope, edge cases, and acceptance before coding.

skill.name: troubleshoot
skill.description: Isolate root causes and propose targeted fixes with clear validation steps.
